ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* CIK (Central Index Key) of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the executive */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the executive (e.g., CEO, CFO, CTO) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the executive belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the executive */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the executive */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the executive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executives_positions" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the executive started in the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the executive ended in the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive the compensation record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the compensation data is for */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the executive */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus of the executive */,
  "stockAwards" REAL /* Stock awards granted to the executive */,
  "optionAwards" REAL /* Option awards granted to the executive */,
  "nonEquityIncentiveCompensation" REAL /* Non-equity incentive compensation */,
  "otherCompensation" REAL /* Other compensation */,
  "total" REAL /* Total compensation */,
  "changeInPensionValueAndDeferredEarnings" REAL /* Change in pension value and deferred earnings */,
  "deferredCompensation" REAL /* Deferred compensation */,
  "compensationType" TEXT /* Type of compensation (e.g., annual, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_year" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compensation record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id", "year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "year" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Is the year the current year? */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies_executives" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the executive started at the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the executive ended at the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Data viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compensation record */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_compensation_id FOREIGN KEY ("compensation_id") REFERENCES compensation ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
